mission.title: keda: scaledjobs.keda.sh CRD is too long.
mission.description: scaledjobs.keda.sh CRD is too long.. This issue affects 7+ users.

steps.title: Identify keda troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your keda deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda -n keda --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review keda configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant keda configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda
kubectl get configmap -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=keda
```
### Report

When I install KEDA with kubectl, it returns a message like this:
The CustomResourceDefinition "scaledjobs.keda.sh" is invalid: metadata.annotations: Too long: must have at most 262144 bytes

### Expected

steps.title: Apply the fix for scaledjobs.keda.sh CRD is too long.
steps.description:
does `kubectl apply --server-side -f ...` help with the problem?

steps.title: Confirm scaledjobs.keda.sh CRD is too long. is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda -n keda --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n keda --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.
